column1: # Seize the Seas - HIRING HALLS (founder 2026-07-01): every town sells pawns
# ALL towns carry ALL 6 species for now (specialized towns later
# PRICE RULE: half the price waters the pawn (100g = 1 level = $1 endowment flow) so every hire can WORK day one.
# CEILING: veteran (level 5 / one stat 5) is the BEST any hall sells - higher pawns come ONLY from special locations + in-game events (and P2P pawn trading later). Gold cannot buy past level 5.
# collection = per-town muster crew (ERC721 distributor from shipyard launch) - filled in by the launch run.
